title: Update live Medication Review split-score rubric and composite logic
description:
Implementation task for the current-medication policy and Medication Review composite fix in SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk.

Acceptance criteria:
- Update live score versions in Plexus for the affected Medication Review scores.
- Validate guideline markdown before pushing guideline-bearing changes.
- Verify direct predictions after the change.
- Record final promoted or non-promoted state in Kanbus.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation. Initial inspection findings: Medication Review: Dosage already excludes no-longer-taken/discontinued meds in the live prompt, but Medication Review: Prescriber does not. Medication Review (Composite) uses older hand-rolled dependency aggregation code and is the most likely source of the client-reported mismatch where the composite can disagree with the four split scores. Plan: patch Prescriber rubric/code for current-medication exclusions, add/normalize guidelines for the affected split scores, simplify/repair composite aggregation logic, then verify with direct predictions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented Medication Review split-score updates and ran 180-day feedback evaluations on the new versions.

New versions created:
- Prescriber: `edc3048a-6e2c-455c-8937-c635b0c02525`
- Dosage: `2a57e656-be2f-4751-b55d-2e7b22f347d1`
- Pharmacy: `1891ccac-6622-481f-a5e8-1ad74655af02`
- Individual Confirmation: `392ac104-15dc-4d31-a3d6-ac8dde5125ff`

Changes pushed:
- Removed `parse_from_start` from all four split scores so final labels parse from the end of the response.
- Updated Prescriber and Dosage to exclude medications the customer no longer takes, discontinued medications, and completed short-course medications such as finished antibiotics from SRX miss counting.

Sanity check:
- `Medication Review: Dosage` on item `294232132` now returns `Yes` with a matching explanation, fixing the prior explanation/value contradiction.

180-day feedback evaluations:
- Prescriber eval `3b059ca8-34dc-446c-ba33-513364794009`: 57 items, Accuracy 68.42%, Alignment 0.3996, dominant RCA = score configuration with 4 mechanical missing-context failures.
- Dosage eval `9d62ea21-626f-44b4-a885-e839e42c58b8`: 55 items, Accuracy 65.45%, Alignment 0.3234, dominant RCA = score configuration with 5 mechanical missing-context failures.
- Pharmacy eval `d0252006-82e0-40e3-9138-aff6a09c1af1`: 52 items, Accuracy 96.15%, Alignment 0.9568, RCA points to guideline-gap ambiguity rather than score logic.
- Individual Confirmation eval `81d8f9e6-0a4c-4170-9579-594f0986589a`: 54 items, Accuracy 90.74%, Alignment 0.8519, dominant RCA = mechanical missing-context failures.

Follow-up tasks created:
- `plx-23c032` Investigate Medication Review composite mismatch after split-score parse fix
- `plx-6ecb47` Fix Medication Review feedback-eval mechanical missing-context failures
- `plx-a63322` Add official guidelines for Medication Review Pharmacy and Individual Confirmation
